creator: moonlapse81@gmail.com
text:
As per summary. Waylock is a screenlocker for Wayland similar to swaylock but written in zig by river author. [1], [2].
References:
[1]: https://github.com/ifreund/waylock
[2]: https://github.com/ifreund/waylock/blob/master/PACKAGING.md
Notice, that -Dcpu=baseline is essential for compiling binary that will run on outdated CPU's. This is also reflected in:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=269206
